response.overview: Amid laughter, memories, and shared bonds, they begin to rebuild their lives and discover their collective strength. Together, they embark on a transformative journey, learning that even a place of passage can become home and that hope can flourish where it is least expected.
response.tagline: Displaced from their countries and deported while attempting to reach the United States, four young LGBTQ+ people find refuge in a shelter in Guatemala City.
response.title: Cobijo
